parsedJson.summary: The provided screenshots are completely blank white images, indicating a critical technical failure or missing content that prevents any user interaction.

issues.title: Screenshots are completely blank
issues.what_observed: Both the desktop and mobile screenshots provided are entirely white with no visible text, images, navigation, or logos.
issues.why_problem: A visitor landing on a blank page assumes the website is broken, hacked, or that the business has closed down. There is zero opportunity to build trust or capture a lead.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A fully rendered homepage with a visible header, navigation menu, hero image of a roof, and a clear 'Get a Quote' button.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Verify the source images are uploaded correctly. If the website is actually blank, this is a server/hosting issue that must be resolved before any design work can begin.
issues.plain_explanation: 您提供的网站截图完全是空白的，没有任何内容。
issues.customer_impact: 如果网站是空白的，100% 的访客会立即离开。这意味着您完全失去了所有潜在客户，没有任何收入机会。

redesign_priorities: 1. Resolve the missing content/blank page issue immediately.
